# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a:8080

  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b:8080

routes:
  - name: route-to-service-a
    paths:
      - /api/a
    services:
      - name: service-a

  - name: route-to-service-b
    paths:
      - /api/b
    services:
      - name: service-b

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-a
    targets:
      - target: service-a:8080
        weight: 1

  - name: upstream-b
    targets:
      - target: service-b:8080
        weight: 1

plugins:
  - name: loadbalancer
    services:
      - name: service-a
    config:
      load_balancer_type: roundrobin

  - name: loadbalancer
    services:
      - name: service-b
    config:
      load_balancer_type: roundrobin
